## TRM1.1. Additional time in taxi-out phase (PI#4) {#trm1.1.-additional-time-in-taxi-out-phase-pi4 .Heading-2-TZ}

Amsterdam Schiphol is the only Dutch airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

The additional time in 2025 decreased to 3.25 min/dep, 5% below 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 3.41 min/dep (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 3.61 min/dep.
